torch_pattern: x = torch.permute(x, (0, 3, 1, 2)); x = torch.nn.functional.conv_transpose2d(x, weight, bias=bias, stride=(stride_h, stride_w), padding=(pad_h, pad_w), dilation=1, groups=groups); x = torch.permute(x, (0, 2, 3, 1))
weight_transform: Weight stays in torch conv_transpose2d layout (in_channels, out_channels/groups, kH, kW) on host (preprocess_weights_bias=False supported); ttnn preprocesses on first call and returns device weights via return_weights_and_bias=True for caching. mirror_kernel=True applies the kernel flip (torch conv_transpose semantics) inside ttnn, so weights are passed unflipped. Bias reshaped to (1, 1, 1, out_channels). Input must be permuted NCHW->NHWC (often row-major) before the call.
applicability_notes: Returns tuple: (output, [out_height, out_width], [prepared_weight, prepared_bias]) or (output, [weight, bias]) depending on return flags; callers cache prepared weights back into module state. 1D transposed conv (e.g. audio upsamplers) is expressed as input_height=1, input_width=seq_len, kernel_size=(1, K).; torch_pattern_source: registered golden for ttnn.conv_transpose2d (F.conv_transpose2d on NCHW with NHWC<->NCHW permutes); golden_src field was null, semantics confirmed by test harness comparing against torch conv_transpose2d

placement_observations.size_descriptor: NHWC flattened (1, 1, N*H*W, C); seen as (batch, 1, seq_len, C) row-major for 1D upsampler case
placement_observations.source: call_site: audio upsampler passes x_nhwc_rm with input_height=1, input_width=seq_len; conv_config sets act_block_w_div and deallocate_activation=False

placement_observations.size_descriptor: (in_channels, out_channels/groups, kH, kW) torch layout, host-resident on first call
placement_observations.source: test: preprocess_weights_bias=False keeps weights on host; prepared device weights returned via return_weights_and_bias=True and cached (upconv_config.weight, self.weight) for reuse
call_site: upconv path constructs compute_kernel_config with LoFi fidelity
